title: Editor polish + video: text font/scale, color picker + MRU, playback/trim/crop, MP4/GIF export
goal: Finish the remaining editor-polish items from the user's report and add the video-editing surface for recordings from phase 12. Text/color model changes go in PhotonzCore (TDD); video trim/crop math is testable core; playback/export plumbing (AVPlayer/AVAssetExportSession/CGImageDestination GIF) is app-side.

tasks.title: Text element: change font and size/scale after placement
tasks.notes: User can't change font or scale of a placed text element. Add a font picker + size control (and/or live frame-scale that updates fontSize) to the text element's editing UI. TextContent already carries fontName/fontSize/weight (PhotonzCore) — wire the UI and ensure re-render + undo. Keep auto-contrast shadow behavior.

tasks.title: Color picker overhaul: custom colors + recents/MRU palette
tasks.notes: Replace the fixed-swatch chooser with a full custom color picker (system NSColorPanel or a custom HSB/eyedropper picker) plus a persisted most-recently-used palette so users can build a working set fast. Applies to annotations, text, borders. Persist MRU across launches.

tasks.title: Video playback + trim (in/out points)
tasks.notes: Open a recording in an editor surface with AVPlayer playback (scrub, play/pause) and trim handles to set in/out points. Trim math (clamping, min duration) is a testable core type; the actual cut is applied on export (non-destructive until then).

tasks.title: Video crop to a region
tasks.notes: Let the user crop the recording to a rectangular region (reuse the image crop UI patterns / Geometry crop math). Non-destructive: store the crop rect, apply on export.

tasks.title: Export video as MP4, animated GIF, and animated HEIC
tasks.notes: Export the trimmed+cropped recording to H.264 MP4 (AVAssetExportSession with a composition/videoComposition applying trim+crop), animated GIF + animated HEIC (reuse VideoExporter.exportAnimated from 12.5 — AVAssetImageGenerator → CGImageDestination; GIF dict / public.heics + HEICS dict; fps/size caps via AnimatedExportPlanner). NOTE: animated WebP was DEFERRED to backlog in 12.5 — macOS's built-in ImageIO can't write it without a vendored libwebp (conflicts with no-deps); revisit only if a libwebp dependency is accepted. Surface size/quality options.
